creator: schakrabarti@microsoft.com
text:
In the recent FreeBSD arm64 community preview image in Azure, during reboot, I am seeing this panic sometime:

.
ELF ldconfig path: /lib /usr/lib /usr/lib/compat /usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg
lo0: link state changed to UP
Kernel page fault with the following non-sleepable locks held:
exclusive rm rib head lock (rib head lock) r = 0 (0xffffa000012278e0) locked @ /usr/src/sys/net/route/route_ctl.c:797

panic: data abort in critical section or under mutex
cpuid = 3
time = 1690047394
KDB: stack backtrace:

The uname details:
14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #1 main-n263931-5aee3e14d491-dirty: Mon Jul  3 14:15:14 UTC 2023     root@poudriere:/usr/obj/usr/src/arm64.aarch64/sys/GENERIC arm64

And ifconfig details :
